bundle_youth_wellbeing/dist/medicaid_you.long_name: Medicaid and CHIP Youth Wellbeing Rate
bundle_youth_wellbeing/dist/medicaid_you.short_description: Percentage of Medicaid and CHIP child beneficiaries who received youth wellbeing services.
bundle_youth_wellbeing/dist/medicaid_you.long_description: State-level youth wellbeing rates for Medicaid and CHIP child beneficiaries, from the Medicaid and CHIP Child Core Set Quality Measures voluntarily reported by states to CMS (2014–2023). Includes adolescent well-care visits (AWC: percent of adolescents who had at least one comprehensive well-care visit), developmental screening (DEV: percent of children screened for developmental delays by age 3), weight assessment and counseling for children (WCC: percent of children with BMI percentile, physical activity counseling, and nutrition counseling documented), well-child visits in the first 15 months (W15), well-child visits ages 3-4 (W34), children's access to primary care (CAP: percent of children who had a visit with a PCP during the measurement year), ADHD medication follow-up (ADD: percent of children prescribed ADHD medication with a follow-up visit within 30 days), follow-up after ED visit for mental illness (FUM: percent of children with a follow-up visit within 30 days after an ED visit for mental illness), and follow-up after hospitalization for mental illness (FUH: percent of children with a follow-up visit within 30 days after hospitalization for mental illness). Reporting is voluntary; not all states report all measures each year.

bundle_youth_wellbeing/dist/cms_youth_we.long_name: Medicare Fee-for-Service Youth Wellbeing Condition Prevalence by State and Age
bundle_youth_wellbeing/dist/cms_youth_we.short_description: Prevalence of youth wellbeing conditions among Medicare FFS beneficiaries, by state and age group.
bundle_youth_wellbeing/dist/cms_youth_we.long_description: State-level prevalence of youth wellbeing conditions among Medicare Fee-for-Service beneficiaries from the CMS Mapping Medicare Disparities (MMD) by Population Tool. Includes ADHD (attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder), anxiety, depression, and depressive disorder. Prevalence rates are calculated using ICD-10 diagnosis codes in Medicare claims data following Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) definitions. Stratified by age group.

bundle_youth_wellbeing/dist/cms_youth_we.short_name: Medicare FFS youth wellbeing rate by sex
bundle_youth_wellbeing/dist/cms_youth_we.long_name: Medicare Fee-for-Service Youth Wellbeing Condition Prevalence by Sex
bundle_youth_wellbeing/dist/cms_youth_we.short_description: Prevalence of youth wellbeing conditions among Medicare FFS beneficiaries, stratified by sex.
bundle_youth_wellbeing/dist/cms_youth_we.long_description: State-level prevalence of youth wellbeing conditions among Medicare Fee-for-Service beneficiaries from the CMS Mapping Medicare Disparities (MMD) by Population Tool, stratified by sex. Includes ADHD, anxiety, depression, and depressive disorder. Prevalence rates are calculated using ICD-10 diagnosis codes in Medicare claims data following CCW definitions.

bundle_youth_wellbeing/dist/cms_youth_we.short_name: Medicare FFS youth wellbeing rate by race/ethnicity
bundle_youth_wellbeing/dist/cms_youth_we.long_name: Medicare Fee-for-Service Youth Wellbeing Condition Prevalence by Race and Ethnicity
bundle_youth_wellbeing/dist/cms_youth_we.short_description: Prevalence of youth wellbeing conditions among Medicare FFS beneficiaries, stratified by race and ethnicity.
bundle_youth_wellbeing/dist/cms_youth_we.long_description: State-level prevalence of youth wellbeing conditions among Medicare Fee-for-Service beneficiaries from the CMS Mapping Medicare Disparities (MMD) by Population Tool, stratified by race and ethnicity. Includes ADHD, anxiety, depression, and depressive disorder. Prevalence rates are calculated using ICD-10 diagnosis codes in Medicare claims data following CCW definitions.
